name: queueave
description: Plugins for QueueAve, the badminton queue management app. Operate live sessions, matches, players, and courts from Claude.

plugins.name: queueave
plugins.description: Operate QueueAve sessions from Claude: matchmaking, assessment, and full session operations including walk-ins, payments, courts, and match history via the QueueAve MCP server. Uses OAuth (Google sign-in), no token required.
